summary: Tested UI Branding Overhaul, Deploy All button fix, and README.md. All features working correctly. Login page displays divine angel guardian hero image, bigger logo (96x96) with gold accents, gold submit button, and gold-bordered stats cards. Dashboard sidebar has bigger logo (64x64) with gold borders. Deploy All button on /swarm page works - successfully initiated batch deployment for 7 devices.
